ABILENE PD REPORTED 10 WATER RESCUES THAT CONTINUED UNTIL MIDNIGHT. SEVERAL LOW WATER CROSSINGS WERE ALSO CLOSED AND WATER ENTERED ONE HOME.

A RESIDENCE LOST ITS METAL ROOF ON A SECTION OF THE HOME. POWER POLES WERE KNOCKED DOWN. TREES LOST TREE BRANCHES AND THEY WERE ALSO BARE BECAUSE OF LOTS OF HAIL. HAIL WAS AT LEAST 6 INCHES DEEP ON THE NEARBY ROAD.
FLOODED ROADS (COUNTY AND RANCH) AROUND THE CITY OF SILVER.

DELAYED REPORT. TXDOT REPORTS FM 385 IN KIMBLE COUNTY CLOSED DUE TO FLOODING.
CAR WITH THREE PEOPLE IN IT WASHED OFF THE ROAD ON FM 1856 NEAR LAKE SWEETWATER. THE THREE PEOPLE WERE RESCUED BY FIRE FIGHTERS AFTER BEING STRANDED FOR HOURS.

CORRECTS PREVIOUS FLASH FLOOD REPORT FROM 2 SW SAN ANGELO. MEDIA SHARED VIDEO ON FACEBOOK OF URBAN FLASH FLOODING ON LINDENWOOD OFF OF SUL ROSS IN SAN ANGELO THIS MORNING.
SHERIFF DEPT. REPORTED TORNADO ON SOUTH SIDE OF BRADY. POWER POLES DOWN AND ROOF DAMAGE REPORTED.

CORRECTS PREVIOUS TORNADO REPORT FROM 1 S BRADY. NWS STORM SURVEY FINDS EVIDENCE CONFIRMING AN EF0 TORNADO IN BRADY TODAY. TREE BRANCHES WERE DOWN, THERE WAS AN UPROOTED TREE AND ROOF DAMAGE. THE TRACK OF THE TORNADO WAS FROM THE LOWES MARKET ON 17TH STREET TO 15TH STREET AND BRADLEY STREET. DAMAGE PATH WAS 200 YARDS WIDE.

NWS STORM SURVEY FINDS EVIDENCE CONFIRMING AN EF0 TORNADO IN BRADY TODAY. TREE BRANCHES WERE DOWN, THERE WAS AN UPROOTED TREE AND ROOF DAMAGE. THE TRACK OF THE TORNADO WAS FROM THE LOWES MARKET ON 17TH STREET TO 15TH STREET AND BRADLEY STREET. DAMAGE PATCH WAS 200 YARDS WIDE.
SHERIFFS OFFICE REPORTS CROTHERS ST AND WEST WHITE ST CLOSED IN BRADY DUE TO FLOODING.

SPOTTER REPORTED WIND DAMAGE IN HATCHEL WITH LARGE TREE LIMBS DOWN.
SPOTTER REPORTS BASEBALL SIZE HAIL WHICH KILLED A LOT OF CHICKENS IN HATCHEL AROUND THE HIGHWAY 83 AND FM 2887 JUNCTION.
SPOTTER REPORTED QUARTER SIZE HAIL AND 50-60 MILE PER HOUR WIND GUSTS ON HIGHWAY 84 NORTH NEAR NOVICE.

RANCH ROAD 386 FROM MASON TO FREDONIA CLOSED DUE TO FLOODING OF LOW WATER CROSSINGS. SEVERAL STREETS IN MASON CLOSED DUE TO FLOODING. FM 1871 SOUTH OF MASON CLOSED FOR SEVERAL MILES DUE TO FLOODED LOW WATER CROSSINGS.
SEVERAL ROADS CLOSED IN KIMBLE COUNTY DUE TO FLOODED LOW WATER CROSSINGS, INCLUDING HIGHWAY 377 FROM THE COUNTY LINE TO JUNCTION, RANCH ROAD 385 FROM LONDON TO HARPER, RANCH ROAD 479, AND FM 2169.
SHERIFF'S OFFICE REPORTED JOHNSON FORK CREEK FLOWING OVER FM 2169.

SHERIFF'S OFFICE REPORTED BEAVER CREEK WAS FLOWING OVER HIGHWAY 87 10 MILES SOUTHEAST OF MASON. HIGHWAY 87 HAS BEEN CLOSED SOUTH OF MASON. IN ADDITION, HIGHWAY 71 IN NORTHEASTERN MASON COUNTY HAS BEEN CLOSED DUE TO FLOODING.

SHERIFF'S OFFICE REPORTING THAT JOHNSON FORK CREEK IS FLOWING OVER INTERSTATE 10, WITH MULTIPLE SWIFTWATER RESCUES IN PROGRESS. INTERSTATE 10 HAS BEEN CLOSED AS WELL AS FM 2169 NORTH OF INTERSTATE 10 DUE TO JOHNSON FORK CREEK FLOODING.
STRONG THUNDERSTORM WINDS DAMAGED A FENCE AT A RESIDENCE IN ABILENE.
